title: acceptance.reconcile.waived
description: Emitted by AcceptanceReconciler when reconciliation is waived by the acceptance::n-a label. Distinct from acceptance.reconcile.skipped (which now means 'empty-spec' only) so the Finalizer can subscribe to .waived and route waived Epics through to PR creation while empty-spec Epics still terminate without a PR. The reason field is required and pinned to 'waiver'.
